visual: Wide bow stance with arms extended laterally, rear hand forming a hooked 'beak' and front hand pushing outward with palm facing away.
motion_description: The sequence begins from a narrow stance with the right arm extended laterally at shoulder height, hand forming a downward hook, and the left hand positioned near the right chest area. In a slow, steady flow, the left leg steps widely to the side while the torso gradually rotates 90 degrees to the left. As the body turns, the left hand pushes outward to the side, ending fully extended at shoulder height with the palm facing away. The weight smoothly shifts forward onto the bent left leg as the right leg straightens, settling into a wide, grounded bow stance with both arms extended in opposite directions.
